_meta.rules: Preserve slug/keys/IDs. User-facing fields only. No delivery teams or internal marketplace names in display copy.

field_mapping.primary_action_label: listing_attributes.primary_action_label (constant: Request Service for all Drive services)

services.short_description: Align your initiative with company strategy and get expert guidance.
services.purpose: Work with specialists to shape goals, scope, and outcomes for a programme or initiative.
when_to_use: You are starting a new initiative and need direction
You want help turning ideas into a clear plan
when_not_to_use: You only need a document template
The plan is already approved

services.short_description: Independent review of architecture for a major programme or change.
services.purpose: Have your architecture assessed before you commit to a large programme or platform change.
when_to_use: You are launching a major programme or platform change
You need sign-off on an architecture decision
when_not_to_use: The change is small and already covered by existing standards
You only need an informal discussion with your lead

services.short_description: Review shared platform designs before multiple teams depend on them.
services.purpose: Get expert feedback on platform architecture and technical direction.
when_to_use: You are designing or changing a shared platform
More than one team will rely on the outcome
when_not_to_use: The design was already reviewed and approved
Only one application is affected with no shared impact

services.short_description: Request approval to depart from a standard policy or control.
services.purpose: Ask for a documented, time-bound exception when meeting a standard requirement is not possible.
when_to_use: You cannot comply with a policy or control in your situation
You need a formal waiver with a clear reason
when_not_to_use: You can meet the requirement using existing approved options
You have not checked the relevant policy yet
required_inputs: How long the exception is needed

services.short_description: Formal assessment of risk and compliance for a change or engagement.
services.purpose: Understand regulatory, security, and compliance exposure before you proceed.
when_to_use: You are launching something with legal or security implications
A stakeholder asked for a formal risk view
when_not_to_use: A recent assessment already covers this scope
You only need general policy guidance

services.short_description: Check whether expected benefits from an initiative are on track.
services.purpose: Review benefits tracking and evidence for an active initiative or stage gate.
when_to_use: You need to confirm benefits are being delivered
A milestone requires benefits evidence
when_not_to_use: The initiative has not started yet
Benefits were never defined in the business case

services.short_description: Share a new idea for feedback and prioritisation.
services.purpose: Put forward an innovation idea and get guidance on next steps.
when_to_use: You have a new product, process, or improvement idea
You want feedback before investing further
when_not_to_use: The idea is already funded and in delivery
You need automation built — use Process automation instead

services.short_description: Get help adopting AI for a specific use case.
services.purpose: Request guidance and enablement to use AI safely and effectively for a defined need.
when_to_use: You want to use AI for a clear business problem
You need help choosing approach, tools, or data
when_not_to_use: You only need general awareness training
Your use case relies on unapproved data

services.short_description: Design and build automation for a repeatable business process.
services.purpose: Replace manual steps with an automated workflow or bot for a stable, repeatable process.
when_to_use: The process is well understood and happens often
You have documented steps and owners
when_not_to_use: The process is still changing
You need a one-off manual task completed

services.short_description: Create searchable, structured knowledge for your team.
services.purpose: Design and build a knowledge base or retrieval system so people can find answers quickly.
when_to_use: Important knowledge is scattered or hard to find
Your team needs a maintained knowledge hub
when_not_to_use: You only need one article published
Source content is not approved yet

services.short_description: Dashboards, insights, or models to support a business decision.
services.purpose: Get analytics or decision-support built for a specific question or choice.
when_to_use: You need data to make a defined decision
Relevant data exists or can be identified
when_not_to_use: You need a one-off report with no ongoing need
Required data is not approved for use

services.short_description: Expert help to start or run a continuous improvement effort.
services.purpose: Get advisory support to improve how a team or process performs over time.
when_to_use: You want structured improvement with sponsor support
You have a defined area to improve
when_not_to_use: You need a single incident fixed
No one is assigned to lead the improvement

services.short_description: Get a copy of your pay slip when you cannot download it yourself.
services.purpose: Receive a pay slip by email or request when the self-service portal is unavailable.
when_to_use: You need a slip for a bank, visa, or third party
You cannot access the HR portal
when_not_to_use: You can download your slip from the HR portal

services.short_description: Official letter confirming your employment or salary.
services.purpose: Request a formal letter for banks, landlords, or authorities that need proof of employment or pay.
when_to_use: A third party needs proof of employment or salary on letterhead
You need an official certificate
when_not_to_use: Simple employment confirmation is enough — use Employment verification letter

services.short_description: Change the bank account where your salary is paid.
services.purpose: Update payroll with new bank details so your salary goes to the correct account.
when_to_use: You opened a new account for salary
Your bank details changed
when_not_to_use: You only need expense reimbursement to a different account
required_inputs: New bank name and account details

services.short_description: Request annual, sick, or unpaid time off.
services.purpose: Submit leave and notify your manager through the official process.
when_to_use: You need time off and want it recorded
You are reporting sick leave
when_not_to_use: Leave was already entered for you by HR

services.short_description: Find out how much leave you have left.
services.purpose: Get your current leave balance when the portal is unclear or unavailable.
when_to_use: You are planning time off
The balance shown online looks wrong
when_not_to_use: Your balance is visible and correct in the HR portal

services.short_description: Request approval to work from home or remotely.
services.purpose: Ask for approved remote or hybrid working for a defined period.
when_to_use: You need to work away from the office for specific dates
Your role allows remote work with approval
when_not_to_use: You need a permanent arrangement change — speak to your manager first

services.short_description: Correct a wrong or missing attendance record.
services.purpose: Update your timesheet or attendance when hours were recorded incorrectly.
when_to_use: Hours were logged wrong
A clock-in or clock-out is missing
when_not_to_use: You need to change approved leave — use Book leave

services.short_description: Request approval for overtime hours.
services.purpose: Get overtime recorded and approved for work outside your normal schedule.
when_to_use: You worked or will work extra hours
Your manager supports the claim
when_not_to_use: Overtime is not allowed for your role without prior approval

services.short_description: Start recruitment for an approved new position.
services.purpose: Raise a requisition so recruitment can begin for a new hire.
when_to_use: Headcount is approved and the role is defined
You need to start hiring
when_not_to_use: You are moving someone internally — use Internal transfer
Headcount is not approved yet

services.short_description: Set up access, equipment, and day-one readiness for a new hire.
services.purpose: Coordinate onboarding so a new team member is ready to start.
when_to_use: A new hire has a confirmed start date
You are the hiring manager or coordinator
when_not_to_use: The role requisition is not approved — open a new role first
required_inputs: New joiner name and start date

services.short_description: Confirm your employment status for a third party.
services.purpose: Request a letter confirming you work here, without salary details.
when_to_use: A verifier needs employment confirmation only
Salary details are not required
when_not_to_use: You need salary on the letter — use Salary or employment letter

services.short_description: Move to a new role or team within the company.
services.purpose: Process an internal role change, promotion, or transfer.
when_to_use: Your role, team, or manager is changing internally
Both managers agree in principle
when_not_to_use: You are leaving the company — use Resignation and offboarding

services.short_description: Start the process when you or a team member is leaving.
services.purpose: Coordinate HR, access, and equipment steps when someone leaves.
when_to_use: Someone has resigned or is being offboarded
You need leaver steps coordinated
when_not_to_use: You only need system access removed — use Remove leaver access

services.short_description: Confidential help with a workplace or people matter.
services.purpose: Raise a sensitive HR matter for specialist, confidential support.
when_to_use: You need HR help with a people issue
The matter cannot be resolved with your manager alone
when_not_to_use: You only need a policy explained — check help articles or ask HR informally
required_inputs: Whether you spoke to your manager

services.short_description: Sign up for a course or learning programme.
services.purpose: Enrol yourself or a team member in approved training.
when_to_use: You have a course or programme to join
Training is required for your role
when_not_to_use: You need a new course created — describe that in your request

services.short_description: Request a new application or subscription for your work.
services.purpose: Ask for software or a tool that is not in the standard catalogue.
when_to_use: You need an app that is not already available
Your team needs a new subscription
when_not_to_use: The tool is already available — request access instead

services.short_description: Request higher permissions for a system you already use.
services.purpose: Get elevated or admin access for a defined task and time period.
when_to_use: Your work requires higher permissions
You need temporary admin access
when_not_to_use: Standard access is enough

services.short_description: Change or renew a software license.
services.purpose: Upgrade, add seats, or renew a software license.
when_to_use: You need more seats or a higher tier
A renewal needs action
when_not_to_use: You need entirely new software — use New software or tool

services.short_description: Request a laptop, monitor, phone, or other device.
services.purpose: Get hardware for a new role, replacement, or upgrade.
when_to_use: You need new or replacement equipment
Your device is faulty or end of life
when_not_to_use: You only need a password reset

services.short_description: Unlock your account or reset a forgotten password.
services.purpose: Regain access when self-service reset does not work or your account is locked.
when_to_use: You cannot sign in
Self-service reset failed or account is locked
when_not_to_use: You never had access to this system — request new access instead

services.short_description: Set up secure access to work systems from outside the office.
services.purpose: Get VPN or remote access so you can work securely off-site.
when_to_use: You need to connect to company networks from outside the office
Your remote access expired
when_not_to_use: You only need access to one application — request that app directly

services.short_description: Turn off system access when someone leaves or changes role.
services.purpose: Remove accounts and access for a leaver or role change on the agreed date.
when_to_use: Someone is leaving or moving roles
Access must be removed on a set date
when_not_to_use: You need to change your own access

services.short_description: Request a workforce or operations report.
services.purpose: Get a report that is not available in self-service dashboards.
when_to_use: You need data for a decision or audit
The report is not in existing dashboards
when_not_to_use: The data is already in a dashboard you can access

services.short_description: Configure a review cycle for your team.
services.purpose: Set up templates, timelines, and system settings for performance reviews.
when_to_use: You are launching reviews for a team
You need HR to configure the cycle
when_not_to_use: You are asking about your own review date — ask your manager

services.short_description: Independent quality check of a process or deliverable.
services.purpose: Request a quality audit or review before a milestone or for evidence.
when_to_use: You need an independent quality check
A customer or audit requires evidence
when_not_to_use: You need a single bug fixed — log an incident instead

services.short_description: Report something broken or blocked in day-to-day operations.
services.purpose: Create a tracked ticket for an operational issue so it can be resolved.
when_to_use: Something is not working in daily operations
You need a reference number for follow-up
when_not_to_use: You need customer delivery support — use Customer support case

services.short_description: Submit a purchase request for goods or services.
services.purpose: Start procurement for an approved purchase within budget.
when_to_use: You need to buy something with approved budget
You have a quote or supplier in mind
when_not_to_use: Spend exceeds your approval limit — confirm with finance first

services.short_description: Register a new vendor in finance systems.
services.purpose: Onboard a supplier so you can pay them and place orders.
when_to_use: You selected a new supplier
Contract is signed or nearly ready
when_not_to_use: The supplier is already registered

services.short_description: Draft or review a commercial agreement.
services.purpose: Get a contract reviewed, drafted, or set up in systems.
when_to_use: A new agreement needs review
Terms changed from the standard template
when_not_to_use: You are using an unchanged standard template

services.short_description: Legal sign-off on a document or question.
services.purpose: Ask legal to review a document or advise on legal risk.
when_to_use: A document needs legal approval before you commit
You are unsure about legal risk
when_not_to_use: The question is purely about payment timing — use Invoice query

services.short_description: Claim back money you spent on approved business costs.
services.purpose: Submit expenses for reimbursement with receipts.
when_to_use: You paid business costs yourself
You have receipts and policy-compliant spend
when_not_to_use: The expense should go on a company card

services.short_description: Petty cash advance or top-up for small office purchases.
services.purpose: Request petty cash for immediate small purchases within limits.
when_to_use: Your team uses a petty cash float
You need cash for small urgent buys
when_not_to_use: The amount exceeds petty cash limits — use Buy something

services.short_description: Ask about invoice status or when payment will be made.
services.purpose: Get an update on an invoice or payment timing.
when_to_use: An invoice is overdue or status is unclear
A supplier is asking about payment
when_not_to_use: You need to submit a new invoice for payment

services.short_description: Request tax certificates or year-end financial documents.
services.purpose: Get official tax or year-end statements for personal or compliance use.
when_to_use: You need a tax certificate or year-end summary
An authority requires official documents
when_not_to_use: You need a salary letter — use Salary or employment letter

services.short_description: Request a salary advance or employee loan under company policy.
services.purpose: Apply for an advance or loan with agreed repayment terms.
when_to_use: You qualify under company policy
You understand repayment terms
when_not_to_use: You need a business expense reimbursed — use Expense claim

services.short_description: Reserve a desk or workspace at the office.
services.purpose: Book a seat for yourself or a visitor on specific days.
when_to_use: You need a desk on a particular day
A visitor needs workspace
when_not_to_use: You only need a meeting room

services.short_description: Request approval and booking for business travel.
services.purpose: Arrange approved business travel including flights, hotels, or visas if needed.
when_to_use: You need to travel for approved business
Bookings or visas may be required
when_not_to_use: You only need a local desk — use Book a desk

services.short_description: Get a new or replacement building access card.
services.purpose: Request an ID badge or update building access on your card.
when_to_use: You are new or lost your card
Your access profile changed
when_not_to_use: You need digital system access only

services.short_description: Help with visas and work permits for Dubai or Nairobi.
services.purpose: Get support for visa applications, renewals, or dependant permits.
when_to_use: You need a new visa or renewal
Immigration deadlines are approaching
when_not_to_use: You only need business travel booking
Your question is answered in the immigration FAQ

services.short_description: Order business cards or standard office supplies.
services.purpose: Order business cards, stationery, or standard office materials.
when_to_use: You need new business cards or branded stationery
Standard supplies are not available locally
when_not_to_use: You need equipment or large purchases — use Buy something

services.short_description: Research a market, segment, or competitor to inform decisions.
services.purpose: Commission research or intelligence you do not have in-house.
when_to_use: You need insight before strategy or campaigns
You lack data on a market or competitor
when_not_to_use: You only need a presentation designed — use Content production

services.short_description: Logos, templates, and on-brand materials.
services.purpose: Get approved brand assets for events, decks, or campaigns.
when_to_use: You need on-brand materials
Existing library assets do not fit
when_not_to_use: Suitable assets already exist in the brand library

services.short_description: Plan and run a marketing campaign with specialist support.
services.purpose: Launch a coordinated campaign across channels with creative and execution help.
when_to_use: You are running a multi-channel campaign
You need end-to-end campaign support
when_not_to_use: You only need one asset — use Brand assets or Content production

services.short_description: Articles, stories, and thought leadership content.
services.purpose: Produce content for campaigns, accounts, or publications.
when_to_use: You need written or multimedia content
Content supports a campaign or account plan
when_not_to_use: You need full campaign strategy — use Marketing campaign

services.short_description: Run a programme to bring in new sales leads.
services.purpose: Launch lead generation for a product, region, or offer.
when_to_use: You need new leads for pipeline
Targeting and offers are defined
when_not_to_use: You already have leads to qualify — use Qualify leads

services.short_description: Improve how customers experience a journey or touchpoint.
services.purpose: Get help redesigning or fixing a customer experience issue.
when_to_use: Customers report friction in a journey
You want to improve a touchpoint
when_not_to_use: A customer reported a specific fault — use Customer support case

services.short_description: Score and qualify leads before sales handoff.
services.purpose: Have inbound or outbound leads reviewed against your criteria.
when_to_use: Leads need scoring or qualification
You have a list ready to review
when_not_to_use: You need new leads generated — use Lead generation

services.short_description: Add a qualified opportunity to the sales pipeline.
services.purpose: Register an opportunity with correct stage, value, and owner in CRM.
when_to_use: A qualified deal is ready for the pipeline
CRM record needs to be created or corrected
when_not_to_use: Leads are not qualified yet — use Qualify leads

services.short_description: Help building a sales proposal or bid.
services.purpose: Get support with proposal content, pricing, or deal desk input.
when_to_use: You are preparing a proposal with a deadline
You need specialist sales support
when_not_to_use: The opportunity is not registered — register it first

services.short_description: Set up or review a customer account plan.
services.purpose: Configure a new customer account or run a structured account review.
when_to_use: A new customer needs account setup
You want a formal account review
when_not_to_use: You are onboarding a partner — use Partner onboarding

services.short_description: Onboard a new partner or alliance.
services.purpose: Register and enable a partner in systems and ways of working.
when_to_use: A partner agreement is signed or near signature
Partner needs to be enabled to sell or deliver
when_not_to_use: The party is a customer — use Customer account setup

services.short_description: Engage platforms, alliances, or ecosystem partners.
services.purpose: Coordinate a strategic engagement outside standard partner onboarding.
when_to_use: You are pursuing a strategic alliance or ecosystem deal
Multiple teams need to coordinate
when_not_to_use: Standard partner onboarding covers your need

services.short_description: Prepare a new customer to receive service.
services.purpose: Set up access, data, and runbooks so a new customer can go live.
when_to_use: Contract is signed and kick-off is scheduled
Customer needs to be ready on go-live date
when_not_to_use: The sale is still in pipeline — complete account setup first

services.short_description: Deliver an approved customer order or contractual item.
services.purpose: Execute and track fulfilment of a customer order to completion.
when_to_use: An order is approved and ready to deliver
You need tracked fulfilment
when_not_to_use: The order is not approved or funded yet

services.short_description: Log an issue or request from a customer.
services.purpose: Create a tracked support case with agreed response times.
when_to_use: A customer reported a problem or needs help
The case needs formal tracking
when_not_to_use: The issue is internal only — use Log an incident

services.short_description: Configure how customer cases are routed and escalated.
services.purpose: Set up queues and routing rules for a customer or product.
when_to_use: A new product or team needs case management setup
Routing rules have changed
when_not_to_use: You are logging one customer issue — use Customer support case

services.short_description: Escalate a urgent customer or production incident.
services.purpose: Bring urgent incidents to the right people when impact is high or SLA is at risk.
when_to_use: Impact is high or SLA is at risk
Normal support path is not enough
when_not_to_use: Low-priority query — use Customer support case

services.short_description: Manage renewals, upgrades, or contract changes for a customer.
services.purpose: Coordinate lifecycle events such as renewals or contract changes.
when_to_use: A renewal or expansion window is open
Customer lifecycle stage needs action
when_not_to_use: You are onboarding a brand-new customer — use Customer onboarding

services.short_description: Request development or enhancement of a product capability.
services.purpose: Start build work for an approved product feature or enhancement.
when_to_use: A backlog item is approved for build
Requirements and acceptance criteria exist
when_not_to_use: You need a custom customer solution — use Solution delivery

services.short_description: Engage a team to design and deliver a customer solution.
services.purpose: Run a multi-step solution engagement for a customer programme.
when_to_use: You need a tailored solution for a customer
Design and delivery phases are in scope
when_not_to_use: A small product change is enough — use Build product feature

services.short_description: Stand up a new delivery project with governance and team.
services.purpose: Create project structure, resourcing, and controls for approved work.
when_to_use: Funding or statement of work is approved
You need a project formally set up
when_not_to_use: Ongoing managed operations cover the need — use Managed services

services.short_description: Request ongoing managed operations for a customer or platform.
services.purpose: Start a managed service with defined scope and service levels.
when_to_use: You need ongoing run support with SLAs
Scope and service levels are defined
when_not_to_use: Fixed-scope project delivery is enough — use Set up delivery project

services.short_description: Help with live systems and production operations.
services.purpose: Get support for production issues, deployments, or platform operations.
when_to_use: Production needs urgent or specialist support
You need deployment or monitoring help
when_not_to_use: Work is still in build phase — use Build product feature or Set up project

services.short_description: Review delivery KPIs and improvement actions.
services.purpose: Assess how well delivery is performing against targets and agree next steps.
when_to_use: A review or QBR needs performance evidence
You want an independent read on delivery health
when_not_to_use: You need a one-off incident report — use Escalate incident
